---
name: Bug report
about: Template for describing and resolving errors
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: main-develop

---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to ...;
2. Click on ...;
3. Scroll down to ...;
4. See error.

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what should have happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Desktop (if relevant)
 - OS [e.g. Linux]
 - Browser [e.g. Firefox, LibreWolf]
 - Version [e.g. 22]
 - Other [e.g., dependencies, if relevant]

## Smartphone (if relevant)
 - Device [e.g. iPhone6]
 - OS [e.g. iOS8.1]
 - Browser [e.g. Firefox, Safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22]
 - Other [e.g., dependencies, if relevant]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
